name: Urolithin A middle-aged muscle-strength registry
summary: Recruiting randomized triple-masked trial testing placebo, 500 mg Mitopure, or 1000 mg Mitopure for 6 months in healthy middle-aged adults, with isokinetic knee-flexion strength as the primary endpoint and strength, lean mass, and vertical-jump secondary endpoints.
population: Estimated 120 healthy adults aged 40 to 65 years

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry estimated study completion on October 31, 2027 and had no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: Recruiting trial-watch context, not evidence of benefit.
trial_details.why_it_matters: A larger middle-aged muscle-strength trial could test whether earlier urolithin A strength signals replicate, but current registry status only supports coverage and watchlist completeness.
